# SPDX-License-Identifier: AGPL-3.0-or-later OR LicenseRef-Muscovite-Commercial

# Generated by muscomp. DO NOT EDIT.

cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.25)

find_package(Protobuf REQUIRED)
find_package(gRPC REQUIRED)

# Proto source files
set(intermodal_transfer_grpc_proto_PROTO_FILES
  proto/transfer_slot.proto
  proto/truck_visit.proto
  proto/rail_wagon.proto
  proto/barge_booking.proto
  proto/chassis_unit.proto
  proto/intermodal_handoff_service.proto
  proto/services.proto
  proto/version.proto
  proto/error_details.proto
  proto/event_streaming.proto
  proto/saga_service.proto
)

add_library(intermodal_transfer_grpc_proto STATIC)

protobuf_generate(
  TARGET intermodal_transfer_grpc_proto
  LANGUAGE cpp
  PROTOS ${intermodal_transfer_grpc_proto_PROTO_FILES}
  IMPORT_DIRS ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/proto
)

protobuf_generate(
  TARGET intermodal_transfer_grpc_proto
  LANGUAGE grpc
  GENERATE_EXTENSIONS .grpc.pb.h .grpc.pb.cc
  PLUGIN protoc-gen-grpc=$<TARGET_FILE:gRPC::grpc_cpp_plugin>
  PROTOS ${intermodal_transfer_grpc_proto_PROTO_FILES}
  IMPORT_DIRS ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/proto
)

target_link_libraries(intermodal_transfer_grpc_proto PUBLIC
  protobuf::libprotobuf
  gRPC::grpc++
)

target_include_directories(intermodal_transfer_grpc_proto PUBLIC
  ${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR}
)
